title: Basic JavaScript Cookies and Sessions
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Cookies and Sessions. Focus on implementing document.cookie API correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Cookies and Sessions
description: Create a function that uses document.cookie API and Cookie attributes (expires, path, domain) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Cookies and Sessions Project
description: Build a small application that applies document.cookie API, Cookie attributes (expires, path, domain), Secure and HttpOnly cookies in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Cookies and Sessions
description: The following code has bugs related to document.cookie API. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Cookies and Sessions
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with document.cookie API and Cookie attributes (expires, path, domain).
